title: Operations Associate
description:
The candidate will support the Operations Department.

Key Duties and Responsibilities

  • Monitor exchange and clearing house activities by identifying bugs and propose change request for the various systems.
  • Manage clearing cycle and margin calls; Post-trade and collateral management.
  • Rightly and timely execute system-related action and configuration according to the daily check list. Prompt and proper escalation whenever necessary.
  • Evaluate the adaptability of the systems to cater for new products.
  • Complete daily and weekly market report, periodic statistics, market analysis report, and statistical work for cross-department demands.

Requirements:

  • Degree or Diploma from reputable educational institutions
  • Able to work flexible hours, shifts and public holidays
  • Strong IT literacy, proficient in using Microsoft Office (Word, Excel and Power Point)
  • Familiar with Financial instruments (e.g. futures, options, swaps, forwards)
  • Good at using Bloomberg or Reuters to collect information, data and news
  • Good oral and written communication skills and the ability to communicate effectively with peers, management and clients
  • Attention to detail and a commitment to producing high quality work under pressure
  • Fresh graduates are welcome to apply

postedCompany.description:
Founded in 2018, Asia Pacific Exchange (APEX) is a derivatives exchange regulated by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS). It is the third derivatives exchange with the “Approved Exchange” and “Approved Clearing House” licenses in Singapore after Singapore Exchange Derivatives Trading (SGX) and ICE Futures Singapore. APEX is able to offer a suite of futures and options contracts and currently offers futures contracts covering both financial and commodity products.


In May 2022, APEX launched the Bitcoin Monthly Futures. This is one of the few regulated and cash-settled Bitcoin Monthly Futures Contract traded on a regulated derivatives exchange in Asia Pacific. Different from other spot cryptocurrency exchanges, APEX is a traditional exchange regulated by MAS with a robust membership structure, working with reputational brokerage firms and settlement banks since 2018.


https://www.asiapacificex.com/
postedCompany.name: ASIA PACIFIC EXCHANGE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
